info.title: SprintStack API
info.description: Open-source backend template for a project management platform. Authentication uses HTTP-only cookie (token) set on login. All protected endpoints require the cookie to be present.

next_cursor.description: Pass as ?cursor= on next request. Null means no more pages.

get.summary: Get kanban board — issues grouped by status
Get project workflow — statuses and transitions

from_status_id.description: Omit to allow transition from any status

get.summary: Get online user IDs for a project (WebSocket presence)
Project activity feed with cursor pagination

patch.summary: Update issue (optimistic locking — must supply version)

version.description: Must match current version or 409 is returned

409.description: Version conflict — another update landed first

post.summary: Transition issue to a new status

422.description: Invalid transition or condition not met

201.description: Comment created; watchers and mentioned users notified asynchronously

post.summary: Watch issue — receive notifications on comments/status changes
Start sprint (moves to active — only one active sprint per project)

next_sprint_id.description: Sprint to receive carry-over issues. Omit to send them to backlog.

carry_over_issue_ids.description: Subset of incomplete issues to carry forward. Others go to backlog.

200.description: Sprint completed. velocity_points calculated from completed issues.

get.summary: List incomplete issues in sprint (useful before completing)

delete.summary: Remove issue from sprint (moves to backlog)

get.summary: List notifications for current user (cursor paginated)

patch.summary: Mark a single notification as read

get.description: When `q` is provided, uses PostgreSQL `websearch_to_tsquery` on a GIN-indexed tsvector of issue title + description, ranked by `ts_rank`. Structured filters can be combined with or without `q`. Results are scoped to projects the caller is a member of. Cursor pagination on `(created_at, id)`.
